prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ZT_Key_parent Product Type: KEYCHAIN Brand (from catalog): Zak Tool Existing Title: ZAK Tool ZT-54 Low Profile Key Ring Clip, Black Description: Why ZakTool?
ZAK Tool products are designed especially for Police and Fire agencies. Made in the U.S.A. of the highest quality materials, our products are built to last. For example, our handcuff keys are of a standard design and are compatible with all standard series handcuffs. All keys are made of heat treated stainless steel and are designed to provide an indefinite period of service. Because of the high grade material and craftsmanship employed, it is possible and practical for us to offer an unlimited lifetime guarantee.
Side View. Fits 2.25″ Wide Duty Belt.
ZAK Tool products are designed especially for Police and Fire agencies. Made in the U.S.A. of the highest quality materials, our products are built to last.
Additional Features:
Black Tactical Key Ring Holder
Fits 2.25in. Wide Duty Belts
ZAK Tool products are designed especially for Police and Fire agencies
Made in the U.S.A. of the highest quality materials
ZAK Tool ZT54 Search Terms: Law Enforcement1 handcuff key duty clip belt ring holder chain law enforcement police officer Features: - Black Tactical Key Ring Holder - Most used Tactical Key by Law Enforcement - Steel construction | Black finish - Model: ZT54 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
